name: GH_ParamKind
summary: Enumerates the different guises of parameter

enum_values.name: unknown
enum_values.summary: Unknown, when this happens, something went wrong. Most likely it is due to someone deriving from GH_Param and not setting the kind.

enum_values.name: input
enum_values.summary: Parameter is tied to an owner component as an input.

enum_values.name: output
enum_values.summary: Parameter is tied to an owner component as an output.
